title: Abides in Stone
summary: Your flesh is made of hard mineral, making you a hulking, difficult-to-harm humanoid.
tiers: Tier 6: Ultra Enhancement or Mind Surge
gm_intrusions: Creatures of stone sometimes forget their own strength or weight. A walking statue can terrify common folk.
text: Your flesh is made of hard mineral, making you a hulking, difficult-to-harm humanoid.
details: Your flesh is made of hard mineral, making you a hulking, difficult-to-harm humanoid.
